---
pagetitle: "Co-Labs"
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: ""
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Hero ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hero-section {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 60%, #0c1a2e 100%);
  padding: 3.5rem 2rem 3rem;
  text-align: center;
  color: white;
  border-radius: 0 0 16px 16px;
}
.hero-section h1 {
  font-size: 2.8rem; font-weight: 900; margin: 0;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1;
}
.hero-subtitle { font-size: 1.15rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 0.5rem; }
.hero-tagline { font-size: 0.92rem; color: #64748b; max-width: 620px; margin: 1rem auto 0; line-height: 1.6; }
.hero-stats {
  display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; justify-content: center; margin-top: 1.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.hero-stat {
  text-align: center;
}
.hero-stat-num {
  font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800; color: #e2e8f0;
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
}
.hero-stat-label { font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; }
.hero-cta {
  display: inline-block; margin-top: 1.5rem; padding: 0.65rem 1.6rem;
  background: #2563EB; color: white; border-radius: 8px;
  font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}
.hero-cta:hover { background: #1d4ed8; color: white; }

/* ── Content ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.content-section { max-width: 1040px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }

/* ── How It Works ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.how-it-works {
  display: flex; gap: 2rem; margin: 1.5rem 0 2.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center;
}
.how-step { text-align: center; flex: 1; min-width: 180px; max-width: 250px; }
.how-step .step-num {
  width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: #2563EB; color: white; font-weight: 700;
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.how-step h4 { margin: 0.25rem 0; font-size: 0.95rem; }
.how-step p { font-size: 0.82rem; color: #64748b; margin: 0; }

/* ── Orientation Card ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.orientation-card {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 100%);
  border: 2px solid #334155; border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem; margin: 2rem 0 2.5rem;
  text-decoration: none; color: white;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.orientation-card:hover {
  border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(99,102,241,0.2);
  text-decoration: none; color: white;
}
.orientation-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
.orientation-content { flex: 1; }
.orientation-label {
  font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; color: #6366f1;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.orientation-title { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #f8fafc; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.orientation-desc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #94a3b8; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }
.orientation-badge {
  background: rgba(99,102,241,0.2); color: #a5b4fc; padding: 6px 16px;
  border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600;
  border: 1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.3); white-space: nowrap;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ── Volume Header ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.vol-header {
  font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 800; margin: 2.5rem 0 0.25rem;
  color: #0f172a;
}
.vol-header span { font-weight: 400; color: #64748b; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-left: 0.5rem; }

/* ── Phase Section ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.phase-section { margin: 1.5rem 0 2rem; }
.phase-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem; padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
}
.phase-num {
  width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 6px;
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 800; color: white; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.phase-num-1 { background: #6366f1; }
.phase-num-2 { background: #16a34a; }
.phase-num-3 { background: #ea580c; }
.phase-num-4 { background: #dc2626; }
.phase-num-cap { background: #7c3aed; }
.phase-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; }
.phase-desc { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #64748b; margin-left: auto; }

/* ── Lab Grid ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.lab-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: 0.85rem;
}
.lab-card {
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem; background: white;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
  text-decoration: none; color: inherit; display: block;
  position: relative;
}
.lab-card:hover {
  border-color: #2563EB; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37,99,235,0.1);
  text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.lab-card-top {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}
.lab-num {
  font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; color: #94a3b8;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}
.lab-wall {
  font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 7px;
  border-radius: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}
.wall-memory { background: #eff6ff; color: #2563eb; }
.wall-latency { background: #fef2f2; color: #dc2626; }
.wall-thermal { background: #fff7ed; color: #ea580c; }
.wall-sram { background: #ecfdf5; color: #16a34a; }
.wall-data { background: #fefce8; color: #ca8a04; }
.wall-compute { background: #f5f3ff; color: #7c3aed; }
.wall-fleet { background: #fdf2f8; color: #db2777; }
.wall-ops { background: #f0f9ff; color: #0284c7; }
.wall-scaling { background: #faf5ff; color: #9333ea; }
.wall-carbon { background: #ecfdf5; color: #059669; }
.wall-fairness { background: #fef2f2; color: #be123c; }
.wall-privacy { background: #f0f9ff; color: #0369a1; }
.wall-robust { background: #fff7ed; color: #c2410c; }

.lab-title {
  font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a;
  margin: 0.15rem 0 0.35rem; line-height: 1.3;
}
.lab-desc { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }
.lab-meta {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; margin-top: 0.5rem;
  font-size: 0.7rem; color: #94a3b8;
}
.lab-badge {
  display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 12px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600;
  background: #eff6ff; color: #2563EB;
}
.lab-badge-cap { background: #f5f3ff; color: #7c3aed; }
.lab-prereq { font-style: italic; }

/* ── Tooltip on hover ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.lab-card .lab-tooltip {
  display: none; position: absolute; bottom: calc(100% + 8px); left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%); background: #0f172a; color: #e2e8f0;
  padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.78rem;
  line-height: 1.5; width: 280px; z-index: 10;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); pointer-events: none;
}
.lab-card:hover .lab-tooltip { display: block; }
.lab-tooltip-label {
  font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; color: #6366f1;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-bottom: 4px;
}

/* ── Ledger & Install ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.ledger-section {
  background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem; margin: 2rem 0;
}
.ledger-section h3 { margin-top: 0; font-size: 1.05rem; }
.ledger-status {
  display: flex; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.ledger-stat {
  background: white; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px; text-align: center; min-width: 100px;
}
.ledger-stat-num {
  font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 800; color: #2563EB;
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
}
.ledger-stat-label { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; }

.install-section {
  background: #0f172a; color: #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem; margin: 2rem 0;
}
.install-section h3 { color: white; margin-top: 0; font-size: 1.05rem; }
.install-section code {
  background: #1e293b; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;
  border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #93c5fd;
}
.install-section pre {
  background: #1e293b; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 8px;
  margin: 0.75rem 0; overflow-x: auto;
}
.install-section pre code { padding: 0; background: none; }

/* ── Responsive ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .hero-section h1 { font-size: 2rem; }
  .orientation-card { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
  .phase-desc { display: none; }
  .lab-card .lab-tooltip { display: none !important; }
}
</style>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- HERO                                                              -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="hero-section">
  <h1>Co-Labs</h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">See ML Systems in Action</p>
  <p class="hero-tagline">
    33 interactive labs powered by MLSys&middot;IM. Each lab runs in your browser
    with live instruments, prediction locks, and reactive simulations.
    No installation required.
  </p>
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <div class="hero-stat-num">33</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Interactive Labs</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <div class="hero-stat-num">2</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Volumes</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <div class="hero-stat-num">22</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Systems Walls</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <div class="hero-stat-num" id="ledger-count">0</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Labs Completed</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <a href="#vol-i" class="hero-cta">Browse Labs &darr;</a>
</div>

<div class="content-section">

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- HOW IT WORKS                                                      -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="how-it-works">
  <div class="how-step">
    <div class="step-num">1</div>
    <h4>Click a Lab</h4>
    <p>Choose from 33 labs across two volumes</p>
  </div>
  <div class="how-step">
    <div class="step-num">2</div>
    <h4>It Runs in Your Browser</h4>
    <p>Powered by Marimo + WebAssembly &mdash; zero setup</p>
  </div>
  <div class="how-step">
    <div class="step-num">3</div>
    <h4>Your Progress Saves</h4>
    <p>The Design Ledger tracks decisions across all labs</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- ORIENTATION                                                       -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<a href="vol1/lab_00_introduction/" class="orientation-card">
  <div class="orientation-icon">&#x1F3AF;</div>
  <div class="orientation-content">
    <div class="orientation-label">Start Here &middot; Orientation</div>
    <div class="orientation-title">The Architect's Portal</div>
    <p class="orientation-desc">
      UI orientation, Design Ledger setup, and deployment context selection.
      Complete this before any other lab.
    </p>
  </div>
  <div class="orientation-badge">~15 min</div>
</a>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- VOLUME I                                                          -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<h2 id="vol-i" class="vol-header">Volume I: Foundations <span>16 labs &middot; Single-machine ML systems</span></h2>

<!-- Phase 1: Foundations -->
<div class="phase-section">
  <div class="phase-header">
    <div class="phase-num phase-num-1">I</div>
    <div class="phase-title">Foundations</div>
    <div class="phase-desc">The D&middot;A&middot;M Triad, Iron Law, and deployment spectrum</div>
  </div>
  <div class="lab-grid">

    <a href="vol1/lab_01_ml_intro/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 01</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-memory">Memory Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The AI Triad</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">The D&middot;A&middot;M Triad and the 9-order-of-magnitude gap between H100 and Cortex-M7.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~45 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 00</span></div>
      <div class="lab-tooltip">
        <div class="lab-tooltip-label">Core Question</div>
        If the same model deployed to an H100, a Jetson, and an ESP32 fails for three different physical reasons &mdash; how do you diagnose which axis to fix before spending the budget?
      </div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol1/lab_02_ml_systems/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 02</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-memory">Memory Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Iron Law</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Physics of performance: T = D/BW + O/R + L applied to real hardware.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~55 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 01</span></div>
      <div class="lab-tooltip">
        <div class="lab-tooltip-label">Core Question</div>
        When the Iron Law says your H100 is memory-bound at batch=1, what happens when you double compute throughput &mdash; and why doesn't it help?
      </div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol1/lab_03_ml_workflow/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 03</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-ops">Ops Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Silent Degradation Loop</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">MLOps feedback loops and iteration velocity tradeoffs.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~45 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 02</span></div>
      <div class="lab-tooltip">
        <div class="lab-tooltip-label">Core Question</div>
        If no code has changed but accuracy dropped 13% in production, where in the ML workflow did the system silently fail?
      </div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol1/lab_04_data_engr/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 04</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-data">Data Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Data Gravity Trap</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Pipeline bottlenecks where data volume dominates compute cost.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 03</span></div>
      <div class="lab-tooltip">
        <div class="lab-tooltip-label">Core Question</div>
        When moving 10 TB of training data costs more than the GPU hours to process it, how do you restructure the pipeline?
      </div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Phase 2: Build -->
<div class="phase-section">
  <div class="phase-header">
    <div class="phase-num phase-num-2">II</div>
    <div class="phase-title">Build</div>
    <div class="phase-desc">Neural compute, architectures, frameworks, and training</div>
  </div>
  <div class="lab-grid">

    <a href="vol1/lab_05_nn_compute/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 05</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-memory">Memory Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Activation Tax</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Activation memory cost and the memory hierarchy's impact on neural compute.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 02</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol1/lab_06_nn_arch/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 06</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-compute">Compute Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Quadratic Wall</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Transformer attention's O(n&sup2;) cost and architectural bottlenecks.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~55 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 05</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol1/lab_07_ml_frameworks/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 07</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-compute">Compute Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Kernel Fusion Dividend</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Kernel fusion, dispatch overhead, and why frameworks matter.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 06</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol1/lab_08_model_train/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 08</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-memory">Memory Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Training Memory Budget</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Memory = weights + gradients + optimizer + activations. Where does it all go?</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~55 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 05</span></div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Phase 3: Optimize -->
<div class="phase-section">
  <div class="phase-header">
    <div class="phase-num phase-num-3">III</div>
    <div class="phase-title">Optimize</div>
    <div class="phase-desc">Compression, hardware utilization, and the efficiency frontier</div>
  </div>
  <div class="lab-grid">

    <a href="vol1/lab_09_data_selection/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 09</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-data">Data Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Data Selection Tradeoff</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Diminishing returns in curriculum learning and selection cost.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~45 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 04</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol1/lab_10_model_compress/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 10</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-memory">Memory Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Compression Frontier</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Quantization and pruning Pareto frontier &mdash; accuracy vs. efficiency.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~55 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 08</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol1/lab_11_hw_accel/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 11</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-memory">Memory Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Roofline</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Roofline model, ridge point, and MFU &mdash; the memory wall in action.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~60 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 02, Lab 05</span></div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Phase 4: Deploy -->
<div class="phase-section">
  <div class="phase-header">
    <div class="phase-num phase-num-4">IV</div>
    <div class="phase-title">Deploy</div>
    <div class="phase-desc">Benchmarking, serving, and production operations</div>
  </div>
  <div class="lab-grid">

    <a href="vol1/lab_12_perf_bench/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 12</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-compute">Compute Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Speedup Ceiling</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Amdahl's Law, benchmark validity, and the limits of parallelism.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 11</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol1/lab_13_model_serving/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 13</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-latency">Latency Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Tail Latency Trap</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Little's Law, P99 vs average latency, and the batching paradox.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~55 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 11, Lab 12</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol1/lab_14_ml_ops/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 14</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-ops">Ops Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Silent Degradation Problem</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Drift detection, retraining cost, and when models silently fail.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 03, Lab 13</span></div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Capstone -->
<div class="phase-section">
  <div class="phase-header">
    <div class="phase-num phase-num-cap">&#x2605;</div>
    <div class="phase-title">Capstone</div>
    <div class="phase-desc">Synthesis and responsible engineering</div>
  </div>
  <div class="lab-grid">

    <a href="vol1/lab_15_responsible_engr/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 15</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-fairness">Fairness Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">There Is No Free Fairness</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">The fairness-accuracy tradeoff &mdash; quantifying the cost of responsible design.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Lab 10</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol1/lab_16_ml_conclusion/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 16</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-scaling">Synthesis</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Architect's Audit</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Full Design Ledger review &mdash; synthesize decisions across all Volume I labs.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~70 min</span><span class="lab-badge lab-badge-cap">Capstone</span></div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- VOLUME II                                                         -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<h2 class="vol-header">Volume II: At Scale <span>16 labs &middot; Distributed ML systems</span></h2>

<!-- Phase 1: Foundations -->
<div class="phase-section">
  <div class="phase-header">
    <div class="phase-num phase-num-1">I</div>
    <div class="phase-title">Foundations</div>
    <div class="phase-desc">Scale illusion, compute infrastructure, communication, and data pipelines</div>
  </div>
  <div class="lab-grid">

    <a href="vol2/lab_01_introduction/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 01</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-fleet">Fleet Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Scale Illusion</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">1000x hardware &ne; 1000x speedup. Fleet reliability, coordination tax, and the C-Cubed diagnostic.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol2/lab_02_compute_infra/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 02</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-memory">Memory Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Compute Infrastructure Wall</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">The Memory Wall, Roofline at fleet scale, and the bandwidth staircase from NVLink to Ethernet.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~55 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 01</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol2/lab_03_communication/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 03</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-latency">Latency Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">Communication at Scale</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">The alpha-beta model, collective operations, and network topology tradeoffs.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~55 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 02</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol2/lab_04_data_storage/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 04</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-data">Data Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Data Pipeline Wall</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">The storage-compute chasm, pipeline equation, and the birthday problem at datacenter scale.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 01</span></div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Phase 2: Build -->
<div class="phase-section">
  <div class="phase-header">
    <div class="phase-num phase-num-2">II</div>
    <div class="phase-title">Build</div>
    <div class="phase-desc">Distributed training, fault tolerance, and fleet orchestration</div>
  </div>
  <div class="lab-grid">

    <a href="vol2/lab_05_dist_train/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 05</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-compute">Compute Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Parallelism Puzzle</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Data parallel, ZeRO, pipeline parallel &mdash; each solves one constraint while creating another.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~55 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 03</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol2/lab_06_fault_tolerance/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 06</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-fleet">Fleet Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">When Failure Is Routine</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Young-Daly optimal checkpointing, the checkpoint storm, and serving fault tolerance.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 05</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol2/lab_07_fleet_orch/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 07</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-fleet">Fleet Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Scheduling Trap</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Pollaczek-Khinchine queuing, gang scheduling fragmentation, and the utilization paradox.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~55 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 06</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol2/lab_08_inference/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 08</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-memory">Memory Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Inference Economy</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Serving cost eclipses training within weeks. The KV cache wall and continuous batching.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~55 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 05</span></div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Phase 3: Optimize -->
<div class="phase-section">
  <div class="phase-header">
    <div class="phase-num phase-num-3">III</div>
    <div class="phase-title">Optimize</div>
    <div class="phase-desc">Performance engineering, edge deployment, and fleet operations</div>
  </div>
  <div class="lab-grid">

    <a href="vol2/lab_09_perf_engineering/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 09</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-compute">Compute Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Optimization Trap</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Roofline diagnostic, kernel fusion dividend, FlashAttention, and the optimization playbook.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~55 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 08</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol2/lab_10_edge_intelligence/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 10</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-thermal">Thermal Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Edge Thermodynamics Lab</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Memory amplification tax, adaptation strategies, battery drain, and the federation paradox.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 02</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol2/lab_11_ops_scale/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 11</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-ops">Ops Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Silent Fleet</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">O(N&sup2;) complexity explosion, silent failure tax, platform ROI, and alert fatigue.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 07</span></div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Phase 4: Deploy -->
<div class="phase-section">
  <div class="phase-header">
    <div class="phase-num phase-num-4">IV</div>
    <div class="phase-title">Deploy</div>
    <div class="phase-desc">Security, robustness, sustainability, and responsible AI</div>
  </div>
  <div class="lab-grid">

    <a href="vol2/lab_12_security_privacy/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 12</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-privacy">Privacy Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Price of Privacy</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Privacy scaling wall, privacy-accuracy frontier, defense overhead, and budget depletion.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 08</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol2/lab_13_robust_ai/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 13</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-robust">Robustness Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Robustness Budget</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Robustness tax, distribution drift, defense stack, and the compression-robustness collision.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 09</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol2/lab_14_sustainable_ai/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 14</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-carbon">Carbon Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Carbon Budget</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">The energy wall, geography of carbon, lifecycle shift, and the Jevons trap.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 11</span></div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Capstone -->
<div class="phase-section">
  <div class="phase-header">
    <div class="phase-num phase-num-cap">&#x2605;</div>
    <div class="phase-title">Capstone</div>
    <div class="phase-desc">Fairness, fleet synthesis, and the final audit</div>
  </div>
  <div class="lab-grid">

    <a href="vol2/lab_15_responsible_ai/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 15</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-fairness">Fairness Wall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Fairness Budget</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">The Impossibility Theorem &mdash; DP, Equalized Odds, and Calibration cannot all hold.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~50 min</span><span class="lab-prereq">Vol II Lab 12</span></div>
    </a>

    <a href="vol2/lab_16_fleet_synthesis/" class="lab-card">
      <div class="lab-card-top">
        <div class="lab-num">Lab 16</div>
        <div class="lab-wall wall-scaling">Synthesis</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lab-title">The Fleet Synthesis</div>
      <p class="lab-desc">Full Vol II synthesis &mdash; sensitivity wall, failure budget, and the fleet architecture blueprint.</p>
      <div class="lab-meta"><span>~70 min</span><span class="lab-badge lab-badge-cap">Capstone</span></div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- DESIGN LEDGER                                                     -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ledger-section">
  <h3>The Design Ledger</h3>
  <p>
    Every lab asks you to make predictions and design decisions. The <strong>Design Ledger</strong>
    saves your choices in your browser and carries them across all 33 labs &mdash; from Lab 00
    through the final capstone. Lab 08's training memory budget builds on Lab 05's activation
    analysis, which builds on Lab 01's magnitude calibration.
  </p>
  <div class="ledger-status">
    <div class="ledger-stat">
      <div class="ledger-stat-num" id="ledger-track">--</div>
      <div class="ledger-stat-label">Your Track</div>
    </div>
    <div class="ledger-stat">
      <div class="ledger-stat-num" id="ledger-completed">0</div>
      <div class="ledger-stat-label">Labs Done</div>
    </div>
    <div class="ledger-stat">
      <div class="ledger-stat-num" id="ledger-remaining">33</div>
      <div class="ledger-stat-label">Remaining</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 0.75rem;">
    Your ledger is personal. It lives in your browser's local storage.
    If you switch devices, you can export and import it from within any lab.
  </p>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- INSTALL                                                           -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="install-section">
  <h3>Advanced: Run Locally</h3>
  <p>For the full experience with MLSys&middot;IM's physics engine, run labs locally:</p>
  <pre><code>pip install mlsysim[labs]
git clone https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book.git
cd cs249r_book/labs
marimo run vol1/lab_01_ml_intro.py</code></pre>
</div>

<p style="text-align: center; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-top: 2rem;">
  Part of the <a href="../book/">Machine Learning Systems</a> textbook.
  <br/>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions">Share feedback</a> &middot; <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book">View source</a>
</p>

</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- Design Ledger Integration (reads from IndexedDB)                  -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<script>
(function() {
  function updateUI(raw) {
    if (!raw) return;
    try {
      var ledger = JSON.parse(raw);
      var track = ledger.track || ledger.deployment_context || '--';
      var completed = 0;
      if (ledger.chapters && typeof ledger.chapters === 'object') {
        completed = Object.keys(ledger.chapters).length;
      } else if (ledger.history && Array.isArray(ledger.history)) {
        completed = ledger.history.length;
      } else if (ledger.history && typeof ledger.history === 'object') {
        completed = Object.keys(ledger.history).length;
      }
      var remaining = Math.max(0, 33 - completed);

      var trackEl = document.getElementById('ledger-track');
      var completedEl = document.getElementById('ledger-completed');
      var remainingEl = document.getElementById('ledger-remaining');
      var countEl = document.getElementById('ledger-count');

      if (trackEl) trackEl.textContent = track.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + track.slice(1);
      if (completedEl) completedEl.textContent = completed;
      if (remainingEl) remainingEl.textContent = remaining;
      if (countEl) countEl.textContent = completed;
    } catch(e) {}
  }

  try {
    var request = indexedDB.open("mlsys_ledger_db", 1);
    request.onsuccess = function(e) {
      var db = e.target.result;
      if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains("ledger")) return;
      try {
        var tx = db.transaction("ledger", "readonly");
        var store = tx.objectStore("ledger");
        var getReq = store.get("mlsys_design_ledger");
        getReq.onsuccess = function() {
          if (getReq.result) updateUI(getReq.result);
        };
      } catch(err) {}
    };
  } catch(e) {}
})();
</script>
```
